query: UPDATE quickfireQuestions SET question = REPLACE(question, 'LARDS', 'LARS'), explanation = REPLACE(explanation, 'LARDS', 'LARS'), reviewAnswer = REPLACE(reviewAnswer, 'LARDS', 'LARS') WHERE question LIKE '%LARDS%' OR explanation LIKE '%LARDS%' OR reviewAnswer LIKE '%LARDS%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2mhhtxpXA9Esras.root --database etVPnUidWNWG8W4GHnRqzv --execute UPDATE quickfireQuestions SET question = REPLACE(question, 'LARDS', 'LARS'), explanation = REPLACE(explanation, 'LARDS', 'LARS'), reviewAnswer = REPLACE(reviewAnswer, 'LARDS', 'LARS') WHERE question LIKE '%LARDS%' OR explanation LIKE '%LARDS%' OR reviewAnswer LIKE '%LARDS%';
